pre_L15_valley.interpretation: Pre-FA prep layer — 1 layer before full-attention boundary L15; deepest valley in network

findings: PRIMARY: Depth gradient — hostility rises monotonically from early to late layers (early=0.900, mid=0.909, late=0.936)
FALSIFIED: Full-attention layers are NOT systematically more hostile (FA mean 0.906 vs sliding 0.917)
ANOMALY: L14 is a 3.14-sigma low outlier (0.682) — 1 layer before FA boundary L15; mechanism unclear
ANOMALY: L35 (terminal FA) collapses from 0.975 to 0.720 — possible learned output normalization
SECONDARY: 3 of 4 anomalous-low layers are sliding-window; FA anomaly only at terminal position
SECONDARY: Post-FA deltas are mixed — no consistent spike or relief pattern across FA boundaries
